title: alectryon excelsus subsp. grandis
intro: Alectryon excelsus subsp. grandis, also known as the 'Giant Bird's Eye' or 'Yellow Bird's Eye', is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alectryon excelsus subsp. grandis include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
